en.name: Color Match
en.desc: Test your color perception! Match colors quickly and accurately. A fun way to train your visual processing speed and color recognition.

zh.name: 颜色匹配
zh.desc: 测试你的颜色感知！快速准确地匹配颜色。训练视觉处理速度和颜色识别的有趣方式。
zh.howToPlay: A word appears in a certain color. Click the button that matches the COLOR you see, not the word. For example, if "RED" appears in blue text, click BLUE.
tips: Focus on the color, ignore the word
Stay calm when the word and color conflict
